title: Bunium caroides
taxonomy: Bunium caroides is a species of plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is also known as caraway, which is a common name shared with its close relative Bunium bulbocastanum. Bunium caroides is closely related to the caraway plant (Carum carvi) but they are not the same species. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a distinct species within the genus Bunium.
